raid.name: Spookspire Keep
notes: Standalone raid-data file for Raid Night content authoring.
Ability behaviors are designed to feel like spookspire_keep/TBC mechanics while staying simple enough to map into Raid Night later.
Several fights include multi-actor encounters and scripted phase notes that would need scene logic beyond the current single-boss level01 runtime.

moonlit_hoofstrike.name: Moonlit Hoofstrike
moonlit_hoofstrike.raidnightHint: Frontal cleave on highest-threat target that splashes a lighter hit to one adjacent ally.

stable_stench.name: Stable Stench
stable_stench.raidnightHint: Raid-wide cursed stink that lightly chips health and could reduce hit chance by 2%.

graveyard_gallop.name: Graveyard Gallop
graveyard_gallop.raidnightHint: Rushes a random non-tank target, briefly dropping threat focus before snapping back.

back_in_the_saddle.name: Back in the Saddle
back_in_the_saddle.raidnightHint: One-time transition buff when rider mounts Nighttime.

silverware_jab.name: Silverware Jab
silverware_jab.raidnightHint: Hits the tank and briefly lowers their threat generation or forces a target swap feel.

blinding_napkin.name: Blinding Napkin
blinding_napkin.raidnightHint: Short disorient on a random ally.

butlers_exit.name: Butler's Exit
butlers_exit.raidnightHint: Brief vanish that drops target lock and primes Garrote.

black_tie_garrote.name: Black-Tie Garrote
black_tie_garrote.raidnightHint: Long bleed on one non-tank target; intended to feel scary for the healer.

scalding_scold.name: Scalding Scold
scalding_scold.raidnightHint: Holy burn on a random ally with a short lingering tick.

proper_rebuke.name: Proper Rebuke
proper_rebuke.raidnightHint: Bounces through the party, dealing higher damage when allies are all alive.

time_out.name: Time-Out
time_out.raidnightHint: Short party-wide stun/disorient, except the highest-threat target if you want a tank-safe implementation.

sanctified_floor_wax.name: Sanctified Floor Wax
sanctified_floor_wax.raidnightHint: Persistent radiant floor damage aura while active.

encounters.name: Big Bad Wolf
encounters.sourceEncounter: Opera Event - The Big Bad Wolf

marked_for_the_matinee.name: Marked for the Matinee
marked_for_the_matinee.raidnightHint: Fixates one non-tank target and chases them for a few seconds.

aisle_rake.name: Aisle Rake
aisle_rake.raidnightHint: Heavy melee sweep on the tank.

center_stage_pull.name: Center-Stage Pull
center_stage_pull.raidnightHint: Threat shakeup that encourages repositioning or aggro recovery.

stage_dive.name: Stage Dive
stage_dive.raidnightHint: Romeo lunges aggressively at the tank.

no_one_leaves_before_the_finale.name: No One Leaves Before the Finale
no_one_leaves_before_the_finale.raidnightHint: If one lover 'dies' too early, the other revives them once unless both are finished close together.

twister_toss.name: Twister Toss
twister_toss.raidnightHint: Dorothy peppers random targets with storm magic.

yapping_frenzy.name: Yapping Frenzy
yapping_frenzy.raidnightHint: Toto harasses a random target with quick bites.

oil_can_chop.name: Oil-Can Chop
oil_can_chop.raidnightHint: Tin Man cleaves the tank with stiff metallic swings.

cowardly_pounce.name: Cowardly Pounce
cowardly_pounce.raidnightHint: The Cowardly Lion startles one target and may briefly fear them.

projector_vortex.name: Projector Vortex
projector_vortex.raidnightHint: Wicked Witch whirls one target out of action briefly.

broomfire_barrage.name: Broomfire Barrage
broomfire_barrage.raidnightHint: Light raid-wide fire burst from the Witch.

overdue_manifestation.name: Overdue Manifestation
overdue_manifestation.raidnightHint: Summons one astral add equivalent that pressures the party.

condescending_citation.name: Condescending Citation
condescending_citation.raidnightHint: Heavy arcane bolt aimed at the mana user with the most resources or a non-tank ally.

catalog_reorganization.name: Catalog Reorganization
catalog_reorganization.raidnightHint: Stops attacking, takes extra damage, and 'recharges' before resuming.

branding_circle.name: Branding Circle
branding_circle.raidnightHint: Pins one target in place and drains them until broken out.

blackhoof_familiar.name: Blackhoof Familiar
blackhoof_familiar.raidnightHint: Persistent pet that buffs the boss until killed.

hellstall_swarm.name: Hellstall Swarm
hellstall_swarm.raidnightHint: Small imp pack floods the party with chip damage.

spectral_fire_ring.name: Spectral Fire Ring
spectral_fire_ring.raidnightHint: Party-wide warning mechanic: if anyone 'moves' or takes another action too soon, apply extra fire damage.

library_detonation.name: Library Detonation
library_detonation.raidnightHint: Large room-wide burst that should be telegraphed.

ectoplasmic_shackles.name: Ectoplasmic Shackles
ectoplasmic_shackles.raidnightHint: Short control effect on one target.

classroom_detention.name: Classroom Detention
classroom_detention.raidnightHint: Mass polymorph-style pause that sets up the next cast.

final_exam.name: Final Exam
final_exam.raidnightHint: Huge single-target nuke after Detention if not interrupted.

bloodstar_ray.name: Bloodstar Ray
bloodstar_ray.raidnightHint: Red-beam analogue: increases boss damage while one ally soaks it.

menders_ray.name: Mender's Ray
menders_ray.raidnightHint: Green-beam analogue: heals the boss unless handled.

mindlash_ray.name: Mindlash Ray
mindlash_ray.raidnightHint: Blue-beam analogue: drains mana and amplifies magic pressure.

astral_breath.name: Astral Breath
astral_breath.raidnightHint: Heavy tank breath in banish phase.

planar_drift.name: Planar Drift
planar_drift.raidnightHint: Banish-phase swap with altered resistances and softer melee presence.

withering_insult.name: Withering Insult
withering_insult.raidnightHint: Temporarily crushes everyone's health toward 1 HP without killing them.

drop_the_chandelier.name: Drop the Chandelier
drop_the_chandelier.raidnightHint: Infernal-style hazard lands on a target zone and keeps burning it.

dual_inconveniences.name: Dual Inconveniences
dual_inconveniences.raidnightHint: Phase 3 weapon shift to faster attacks.

title_backed_smackdown.name: Title-Backed Smackdown
title_backed_smackdown.raidnightHint: Adds a stacking armor reduction to the tank.

sepulcher_sweep.name: Sepulcher Sweep
sepulcher_sweep.raidnightHint: Tail-sweep style backline punishment if anyone is too close behind.

skeletal_downpour.name: Skeletal Downpour
skeletal_downpour.raidnightHint: Rain of Bones room-wide hit that sets up add spawns.

cinder_spit.name: Cinder Spit
cinder_spit.raidnightHint: Smoking Blast style repeated ranged bombardment while airborne.

gravebound_remnants.name: Gravebound Remnants
gravebound_remnants.raidnightHint: Skeleton adds during the air phase.
